name: stockflow-workspace
description: StockFlow Workspace orchestrating both client and server sub-packages

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Client,Server" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
